stories.headline: Supergirl Director Credits James Gunn for Helping Choose Song for Much-Discussed Slow-Motion Fight Scene - IGN
stories.summary: Director Craig Gillespie says he credits DC Studios co-CEO James Gunn for helping choose the song used in the slow-motion Supergirl fight scene that has caused a stir on social media.

stories.headline: Box Office: 'Toy Story 5' Near $600M, 'Supergirl' Bombs $68M Worldwide - Deadline
stories.summary: 'Toy Story 5' reigned supreme at global box office while 'Supergirl' bombed around the world with $68M while 'Minions and Monsters' began with $10M.

stories.headline: A$AP Rocky Shouts Out Son Riot Onstage as Rihanna Watches in Crowd - TMZ
stories.summary: Rihanna made a rare appearance in Los Angeles Saturday night, stepping out with her son Riot Rose Mayers to support A$AP Rocky during his "Don’t Be Dumb" tour stop at Kia Forum.

stories.headline: 'Supergirl' Stumbles in Box Office Debut, 'Toy Story 5' Remains No. 1 - Variety
stories.summary: "Supergirl" struggled to take flight at the box office, while "Toy Story 5" ruled again.
